title: Transferrin-Enabled Blood–Brain Barrier Crossing Manganese-Based Nanozyme for Rebalancing the Reactive Oxygen Species Level in Ischemic Stroke
authors_text: Qianqian Zhao, Wenxian Du, Lingling Zhou, Jianrong Wu, Xiaoxing Zhang, Xiaoer Wei, Sijia Wang, Yu Huang, Yuehua Li.
abstract: This study presents a transferrin-enabled, manganese-based nanozyme that crosses the blood–brain barrier to rebalance reactive oxygen species levels in ischemic stroke, offering a theranostic nanomedicine approach combining antioxidant therapy with manganese-based imaging contrast.
